steps.prompt: Listen carefully! Add ONE object — just one!
steps.feedback: One! Just one object. Count it — one!

steps.prompt: Add one more — how many will that make? Add another!
steps.feedback: TWO! One… two. Count with me — one, two!
THREE! One, two, three — count them all!

steps.prompt: Two more to make FIVE! Add two more objects.
steps.feedback: FIVE! One, two, three, four, five — you counted to five!
steps.failureFeedback: Keep adding — count as you go!

steps.prompt: Now take some away — can you remove objects until you have THREE left?
steps.feedback: Three again! You took some away and knew when to stop — that's brilliant.
steps.failureFeedback: Count what's left — do you have three yet?
